chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D – 1641 of 2019 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES For hearing of main case. 22.09.2025 Mr. Muhammad Munsif Jan, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Masroor Ahmed Khan, Advocate for respondent No.2. -------------------------------------- Learned counsel for respondent No.2/KW&SC submits that the petition is not maintainable as the petitioner is not customer of KW&SC as he has not been issued a water connection by SW&SC. Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that although water and sewerage lines have been laid in the petitioner’s locality, the residents have not being issued bills by the KW&SC and the water supply is being managed through unauthorized persons who demand payment for such supply. Nevertheless, the fact of the matter appears to be that the petitioner has not been accorded a lawful water connection by the KW&SC. The petitioner may make such application to the KW&SC as per the procedure prescribed, and then if such application is not processed by the KW&SC, the petitioner would be free to move a fresh petition. Petition disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Nadeem Qureshi PA
